notes: DTT data joined to region records by siteId.
The region site file remains authoritative for site name, coordinates, physical site type, status and location metadata.
DTT cluster membership, installation details and directed paths.
The existing eight clusters contain between 4 and 16 sites and are used directly by the map cluster picker.
Distance, bearing and compass direction are not stored; calculate them from the linked region-site coordinates.
Synthetic values are used for paths, equipment, powers, channels, telemetry and masked IP values.
The visual topology uses shallow geographic branches.
Relationship lines are synthetic presentational paths and must not be treated as verified current operational feed routes.
Two synthetic satellite input backup paths are included.
Satellite backup nodes are virtual map endpoints and are not physical records in the region site file.

paths.notes: Synthetic satellite input backup for interface demonstration; not a verified operational route.
